Contact

Get in touch

For inquiries about this introduction site, please reach the address below. For official questions about admissions or school operations, please use the contact channels on the official site.

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

An unofficial introduction to Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology, a private KOSEN located in Kamiyama, Tokushima, Japan.
